description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, dark-tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front features a wide porch with white railings, flanked by two large trees and a paved driveway leading to a parked car. The rear of the bungalow opens to a backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a patio area, surrounded by additional trees. Large windows line both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are primarily white with dark accents, and the property is set on a rectangular lot with paved walkways. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a clean, geometric architectural style.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof, wide porch, large windows, and a backyard pool, set on a landscaped lot with trees and paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide porch, main entrance, driveway with a car, and two large trees flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, the car parked on the driveway, and several trees surrounding the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, patio area, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, patio furniture, and the arrangement of trees and walkways around the bungalow.
